name: @nocms/prose
description: The in-place prose editing widget: a transient ProseMirror edit view over a prose span's mdast inline content. mdast stays the source of truth — the widget takes mdast PhrasingContent in and emits it back out, preserving inline MDX atoms (JSX elements, expressions) verbatim. Depends only on mdast types + ProseMirror core; no dependency on the editor shell.
